name: Spring Rolls (Chinese Egg Rolls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the deep fryer.
2. Shell and clean the shrimp.
3. Chop the shrimp and pork very fine.
4. Heat oil in a skillet or wok.
5. Add shrimp, pork, and celery to the hot oil.
6. Stir-fry for several minutes until the meat is cooked through.
7. Add bean sprouts, mushrooms, soy sauce, sherry vinegar, and salt.
8. Bring mixture to boiling point.
9. Dissolve cornstarch in water.
10. Add dissolved cornstarch to the meat mixture.
11. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until thick and translucent.
12. Set aside.
13. Place 2 tablespoons of filling diagonally across the bottom of each egg roll skin.
14. Fold the bottom corner up over the filling.
15. Fold the side corners in towards the center.
16. Roll up the egg roll tightly.
17. Brush edges with water to seal.
18. Deep fry rolls until crisp and golden (1 1/2-2 minutes).
19. Serve hot with Hoisin sauce or hot Chinese mustard.
